name: Liza Minnelli
abstract: Liza May Minnelli ( LY-zə; born March 12, 1946) is an American actress, singer, and dancer. Known for her commanding stage presence and powerful alto singing voice, Minnelli has received numerous accolades, including an Academy Award, a BAFTA Award, an Emmy Award, two Golden Globe Awards, and four Tony Awards.

about_quotes.speaker: Harold Danko
about_quotes.evidence: When I got the gig with Liza Minelli for a while, which is 1979... I got a chance to do that, get very well paid for a little while
about_quotes.doc_title: Harold Danko interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 28, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Michael Abene
about_quotes.evidence: Like I’ve done stuff for Liza Minelli over the years... The most pressures I’ve had, basically one of the things was usually when we write for Liza.
about_quotes.doc_title: Michael Abene interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 11, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: Dick Hyman
about_quotes.evidence: Bill Lavorgna before he became the conductor for Liza Minelli was a hell of a good studio drummer.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dick Hyman interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 17, 2001 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Gene Bertoncini
about_quotes.evidence: Then a guy named Bill Lavorgna, who started conducting recently for Liza Minelli.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gene Bertoncini interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 13, 2001
